data.title: Fathom Holdings prices public offering of 3 million shares at $2.00 each.
data.description: In Cary, North Carolina, on September 19, 2025, Fathom Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FTHM) disclosed the details of their recent financial activity. The company, known for its technology-focused approach to real estate services on a nationwide scale, has finalized the pricing for an underwritten public offering. This offering encompasses a total of 3,000,000 shares of their common stock, which have been valued at $2.00 per share.
CHINA'S XI, TRUMP HOLD CALL - CHINESE STATE MEDIA

data.title: IMUNON to reveal novel data for IMNN-001 at AACR Cancer Research Conference to advance Phase 3 trial for Ovarian Cancer.
data.description: During the latest fiscal quarter, the company reported an impressive profit of $1.5 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations by 15%. This notable growth in profit can be attributed to a significant increase in revenue, which rose to $10.8 billion, marking a 20% increase from the previous quarter. Additionally, the company's market share grew to 25% in the current quarter, a notable achievement in the competitive industry. The company's CEO expressed optimism about future prospects and indicated plans for further expansion and investment in key areas.

data.title: Beloved football coach "Coach Fab" Fabbri of Sacred Heart Schools in Atherton passed away, mourning community.
data.description: Atherton, California - On September 19, 2025, the community of Sacred Heart Schools in Atherton mourns the loss of Coach Mark Fabbri, also known as Coach Fab, who served as a football coach for over ten years. Coach Fab was a revered figure within the Gator community, embodying the values of mentorship and leadership. His passing has left a profound impact on all who knew him.

data.title: GCCA launches 7th Concrete in Life Global Photography Competition, attracting tens of thousands of entries, celebrating concrete's role worldwide.
data.description: The latest edition of Concrete in Life, a renowned global photography contest spotlighting the significance of concrete worldwide, has been announced in London. In its 7th year, the competition garners tens of thousands of submissions annually from across the globe, showcasing the sustainable, versatile, aesthetically pleasing, and long-lasting qualities of concrete - the world's second most utilized substance after water. Organized by the Global Cement and Concrete Association (GCCA), this year’s competition is expected to attract a large number of participants as previous editions.

data.title: By 2030, preemptive cybersecurity spending to reach 50% (up from 5% in 2024) as per Gartner. Future of security is in prevention, not just detection.
data.description: According to a report by Gartner, Inc., cybersecurity spending is projected to see a significant shift towards preemptive solutions by 2030. Currently standing at less than 5% in 2024, it is estimated that this figure will rise to 50% by the end of the decade. This indicates a substantial increase in the allocation of resources towards proactive cybersecurity measures in the coming years.

data.title: Forge Global announces 2025 Private Magnificent 7 representing over a trillion in value, showcasing rise in private market valuations and AI dominance.
data.description: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. announced the release of the 2025 edition of the Private Magnificent 7 (Private Mag 7), showcasing the significant growth in private market valuations and the increasing influence of artificial intelligence and frontier technologies. The report highlights the remarkable expansion of the private market, with key insights into the evolving trends. This year’s updated edition provides valuable information on the current state of the private market landscape, offering valuable data and analysis for investors.

data.title: TransAct Technologies partners with national sushi franchise, receiving order of 596 BOHA! Terminal 2 LTE units for 2,108 locations.
data.description: TransAct® Technologies Inc. revealed that a major sushi franchise operator has given the green light and purchased 596 units of TransAct’s BOHA!® Terminal 2 LTE. This operator, one of the largest in the nation, plans to upgrade all 2,108 of its locations gradually with the BOHA! Terminals. The initial orders signify the first phase of this network modernization project. TransAct®, a leading provider of software-driven tech and printing solutions globally, made the announcement.

data.title: KB Home opens new community in Converse, Texas. Significant move for  growth in area.
data.description: KB Home has recently unveiled its latest community in Converse, Texas, emphasizing its commitment to building relationships with customers. The grand opening marks the introduction of a new housing development in the area, showcasing the company's dedication to expanding its presence. Located in San Antonio, this community offers a range of housing options and amenities to potential buyers looking to invest in the area. The launch event signifies a significant step for KB Home as it continues to grow and provide quality housing solutions in Texas.

data.title: Constellation's clean energy centers ran at near full power during summer with $7 billion investments in past decade.
data.description: In Baltimore, Constellation's clean energy centers operated at close to maximum capacity amidst prolonged heatwaves and unprecedented humidity levels this summer.

data.title: Oklahoma Museum debuts "Living Pop-Up Book" adventure on 9/20/25. FAMily Discovery Center is a 2-story, 5,000 sq ft attraction designed for children & families.
data.description: In Oklahoma City, the First Americans Museum (FAM) is set to unveil the FAMily Discovery Center (FDC) on September 20, 2025. This new 5,000-square-foot attraction is designed as a giant pop-up book where visitors are greeted by larger-than-life animal relatives and experience changing seasons around them. The FDC offers a full-scale adventure for children, families, and learners of all ages. It features STEAM-inspired activities, hands-on play, and immersive storytelling. This innovative center aims to engage visitors in interactive learning experiences.

data.title: Data breach at Medical Associates of Brevard exposed 246,711 records. Investigation underway. #PrivacyAlert #DataBreach
data.description: An investigation is underway by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco regarding a data breach involving the unauthorized access of sensitive information belonging to 246,711 individuals associated with Medical Associates of Brevard, LLC (MAB), a primary care provider in Florida.

data.title: Equinix opens AI-ready data center CN1 in Chennai, India. Located in Siruseri, Tamil Nadu, addressing demands for digital infrastructure.
data.description: Equinix, Inc., a leading digital infrastructure company (Nasdaq: EQIX), has unveiled its inaugural International Business Exchange (IBX) data center, CN1, in Chennai, India. This facility in Siruseri, Tamil Nadu, is the company's first venture into the region and unveils a significant expansion of its global network. Equinix's investment in CN1 underlines its commitment to meeting the rising demand for digital infrastructure services in India, supporting businesses in the country.

data.title: Data breach at Benworth Capital Partners in FL under investigation after unauthorized access to customer info.
data.description: A law firm in San Francisco, Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP, is currently looking into a data breach that occurred, which resulted in unauthorized individuals gaining access to the confidential data of customers of Benworth Capital Partners, a hard money and mortgage lender located in Florida. The breach is believed to have happened in May of 2025.

data.title: Empery Digital Inc. has increased borrowing facility from $25M to $35M and secured $50M for share repurchases.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Empery Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: EMPD) has raised its committed borrowing facility from $25 million to $35 million. The company also secured a $50 million borrowing through a one-year Master Repurchase Agreement. This agreement will be funded within five business days.

data.title: ReposiTrak, Inc. (NYSE: TRAK) declares $0.02 quarterly dividend ($0.08 annually) to shareholders, with record date on Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, ReposiTrak, Inc., a leading food traceability and compliance network traded on NYSE under TRAK, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.02 per quarter ($0.08 per share annually) for shareholders on record as of September 30, 2025. Shareholders can expect the cash dividend around November 14, 2025. This marks the third dividend boost by ReposiTrak, known for its inventory management and out-of-stock reduction SaaS platform.

data.title: Shake Shack to make Hawaiian debut in 2027, partnering with Union MAK for first Shack on Oahu.
data.description: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) has announced its expansion into Hawaii, with plans to open its first location on Oahu in 2027. The popular burger chain has teamed up with Union MAK Corporation, a prominent Hawaii-based company known for its expertise in hospitality and retail. Union MAK, headquartered in Honolulu, boasts extensive experience in serving the local community through its restaurant ventures. This partnership marks Shake Shack's entry into the Aloha State, with Union MAK spearheading the brand's growth in the Hawaiian Islands.
